ooni.org.name: OONI Explorer
ooni.org.label: Highly Reliable
ooni.org.notes: Independent technical measurement, open methodology, no editorial bias

netblocks.org.name: NetBlocks
netblocks.org.label: Highly Reliable
netblocks.org.notes: Independent network measurement, widely cited, transparent methodology

citizenlab.ca.name: Citizen Lab
citizenlab.ca.label: Highly Reliable
citizenlab.ca.notes: University of Toronto. Peer-reviewed research. Gold standard for digital rights.

rsf.org.name: Reporters Without Borders
rsf.org.label: Highly Reliable
rsf.org.notes: Leading press freedom organisation. Transparent methodology. Paris-based NGO.

freedomhouse.org.name: Freedom House
freedomhouse.org.label: Highly Reliable
freedomhouse.org.notes: US-funded but editorially independent. Rigorous annual methodology.

accessnow.org.name: Access Now
accessnow.org.label: Highly Reliable
accessnow.org.notes: Digital rights NGO. KeepItOn coalition. Transparent, well-sourced reports.

irrawaddy.com.name: The Irrawaddy
irrawaddy.com.label: Generally Reliable
irrawaddy.com.notes: Founded 1993. Exiled Thai-based outlet. Strong Myanmar coverage. MBFC: High.

dvb.no.name: Democratic Voice of Burma
dvb.no.label: Generally Reliable
dvb.no.notes: Founded 1992. Norway-based exile outlet. Strong field network.

mizzima.com.name: Mizzima News
mizzima.com.label: Generally Reliable
mizzima.com.notes: Founded 1998 by exiled journalists. Now operates from India.

hrw.org.name: Human Rights Watch
hrw.org.label: Highly Reliable
hrw.org.notes: Leading human rights organisation. Extensive sourcing. Widely cited.

cpj.org.name: Committee to Protect Journalists
cpj.org.label: Highly Reliable
cpj.org.notes: Journalist safety organisation. Primary source for arrest data.

reuters.com.name: Reuters
reuters.com.label: Highly Reliable
reuters.com.notes: Global wire service. Strong editorial standards. Independent.

khitthitnews.com.name: Khit Thit Media
khitthitnews.com.label: Use with Caution
khitthitnews.com.notes: Fast-breaking local news. Ground-level network. Verify independently.

athan.asia.name: Athan — Free Expression Myanmar
athan.asia.label: Generally Reliable
athan.asia.notes: Myanmar-based advocacy. Tracks journalist arrests. Well-documented.

amnesty.org.name: Amnesty International
amnesty.org.label: Highly Reliable
amnesty.org.notes: Global human rights organisation. Extensive research, transparent methodology.

bbc.com.name: BBC News
bbc.com.label: Highly Reliable
bbc.com.notes: UK public broadcaster. Strong editorial standards. BBC Burmese service.

eng.mizzima.com.label: Mixed Reliability
eng.mizzima.com.notes: Independent outlet with good Myanmar coverage but limited transparency and sourcing details.
eng.mizzima.com.name: eng.mizzima.com

explorer.ooni.org.label: Highly Reliable
explorer.ooni.org.notes: OONI is a respected, independent, and transparent open-source project focused on internet measurement and censorship detection.
explorer.ooni.org.name: explorer.ooni.org

iran-shutdown.amnesty.org.label: Highly Reliable
iran-shutdown.amnesty.org.notes: Amnesty International is a globally recognized, independent human rights organization with a strong track record.
iran-shutdown.amnesty.org.name: iran-shutdown.amnesty.org

english.dvb.no.label: Highly Reliable
english.dvb.no.notes: Independent, established outlet with strong transparency and sourcing.
english.dvb.no.name: english.dvb.no
